scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:backend && npm run build:worker && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace packages/utils run build && npm --workspace packages/db run build && npm --workspace packages/vendor-registry run build && npm --workspace packages/rules-engine run build && npm --workspace packages/policy-parser run build && npm --workspace packages/report-generator run build && npm --workspace packages/browser-runner run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:worker && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm --workspace packages/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/utils run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/db run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/vendor-registry run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/rules-engine run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/policy-parser run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/report-generator run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/browser-runner run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm run lint:packages && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:worker && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:packages: npm --workspace packages/shared run lint && npm --workspace packages/utils run lint && npm --workspace packages/db run lint && npm --workspace packages/vendor-registry run lint && npm --workspace packages/rules-engine run lint && npm --workspace packages/policy-parser run lint && npm --workspace packages/report-generator run lint && npm --workspace packages/browser-runner run lint
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
